Our Promission :Top Quality, Good Service, Competitive Price

settings.title: WHO WE ARE?
settings.content: About DZX Ace ( DZXACE.COM ) is an accessories shop for car belongs to Dezhixing Group Holding Limited. We specialize car accessories aftermarket Since 2021. We cooperate with factories，Our ever-lasting promise is "Competitive Price, Best Service".

settings.title: WHY DO IT?
settings.content: Because the market share of Tesla cars is getting higher and higher, more and more car owners need to improve the performance of their cars, and the cost in retail stores is relatively high, so we directly select factory accessories for sale to customers, reduce product cost.

settings.title: WHAT HAVE WE DONE?
settings.content: We choose the right factory and delivery method, so that it allows all owners to quickly find the various accessories they need in one place, thus avoiding the high shipping costs, time costs and different quality of buying different accessories from different places.

settings.title: Customer Service
settings.content: DZX Ace customers are free to contact us by live chat, email and whatsapp. Don't hesitate to contact us: support@dzxace.com. Qualified engineers will always offer technical support.

settings.title:
Great Company!!!
I sent an email tocustomer service at iSeatCovers Aftermark Accessories over the weekend inquiring as to when my order would be shipped. Rick got back to me right away on monday and told me he would get the order out right away even I did not request expedited shipping. I really appreciated how expediently this handled and going above and beyond for their customers.

settings.html:
our story

Our company was founded in 2021 by a group of professionals who are passionate about technology and innovation. From the beginning, we have been committed to providing high-quality products and services to meet our customers' growing needs.

our mission

Our mission is to provide car owners with professional seat leather covers. We know that in a highly competitive market, only by continuously innovating and providing excellent products and services can we remain competitive.

our perspective

Innovation: We are always looking for new ways to solve problems and improve efficiency. Quality: We insist on pursuing excellence to ensure that our products and services are always of the highest standard. Customer Satisfaction: Our customers' success is our success. We are committed to meeting our customers' needs and exceeding their expectations.

our team

We have a talented and passionate team who are key to our success. Our team members come from various fields and have many years of experience to provide customers with professional support and services.

future outlook

We are confident about the future and we will continue to develop and innovate to meet the changing needs of our customers. We look forward to working with you to create a successful future.

DZX Ace not Refuse Improve and Perfect To pursuit unlimited perfect, DZX Ace aim to work out to make our customers a satisfying shopping experience. DZX Ace welcome your reviews and suggestions, it will become our start point to improve.

settings.text: Follow your passion, and sucess will follow you

settings.title: About Stanchon Hardware
settings.text:
Welcome to Stanchon Hardware, your trusted source for innovative and high-quality hardware products in the United States. We take pride in offering a wide range of solutions designed to make your life easier, more organized, and efficient.

Our Story
At Stanchon Hardware, we are more than just an online seller - we are a team of passionate individuals dedicated to providing the best hardware solutions for your needs. Our journey began with a simple idea: to make everyday tasks simpler and more convenient for our customers.

settings.title: Double-Sided Magnets
settings.text: the perfect balance of visibility and compactness for task tracking, equipment status, or workflow indicators. Ideal for use on whiteboards, metal shelving, or control panels where space and clarity are key.

settings.title: Signage U-Brackets
settings.text: A simple and durable solution for mounting rigid signs with a clean, professional look. These white powder-coated steel U-brackets hold panels securely to posts or walls. Perfect for indoor/outdoor use.

settings.title: Office Sign Brackets
settings.text: A clean and modern way to mount slim signs with a polished look. These 4" corridor brackets hold signs up to 1/8" thick and are perfect for offices, restrooms, or directional signage. Made from polished aluminum, they offer a sleek appearance and reliable hold in professional environments.
